next_steps: Perform pleural fluid cytology and flow cytometry for malignancy
Order a contrast-enhanced CT of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis for staging
Perform diagnostic bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage and biopsy of suspicious parenchymal lesions
Send pleural fluid for ADA testing and mycobacterial culture
Obtain serum protein electrophoresis (SPEP) and free light chain assay to evaluate for plasma cell dyscrasias
Perform thoracic ultrasound to assess for pleural nodules or localized thickening
